entities.name: V (Vrijen)
entities.context: V is the subject of the knowledge system

entities.context: A function type used in the context of V's knowledge system

entities.name: abortSignal
entities.context: Used to abort asynchronous operations when needed

entities.name: fetch

entities.context: The JSON data obtained from the response
